name: cronstrue
when_to_use: 需要把 cron 表达式变成可读说明时用它,而非手写解析——原生手写在 L/W/#、秒/年字段与多语言语序上会失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能稳定解释常见五段 cron;遇到 Quartz 特殊字符、字段数歧义和 locale 会编造含义,本库给出确定性文本。

schema.expression: string —— 5/6/7 段 cron、Quartz cron 或 @yearly 等昵称
schema.locale?: string —— i18n locale id,默认 'en';简体中文用 'zh_CN'
schema.use24HourTimeFormat?: boolean —— 默认由 locale 决定

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers;输出是可放入任意文本节点的描述字符串。
provides.outputs: string —— cron 的人类可读描述

peer.note: 本条只解释语义;若要计算下一次/未来 N 次触发时间,交给 croner,再把 Date[] 喂给时间轴或列表组件。

isolation.evidence: cronstrue@3.24.0/i18n/+esm exports a default (dist/cronstrue-i18n.d.ts: 'export default ExpressionDescriptor'), and ExpressionDescriptor has static toString(expression, {throwExceptionOnParseError,verbose,dayOfWeekStartIndexZero,monthStartIndexZero,use24HourTimeFormat,trimHoursLeadingZero,locale,logicalAndDayFields}) (expressionDescriptor.d.ts L14) — so 'import cronstrue from .../i18n/+esm; cronstrue.toString(expr,opts)' is correct. All schema option keys (locale, use24HourTimeFormat, verbose, throwExceptionOnParseError) are real Options fields. i18n subpath bundles all locales; zh_CN locale exists (dist/i18n/locales/zh_CN.d.ts) so the schema's 'simplified Chinese uses zh_CN' note is accurate. Headless-primitive: returns a plain string, touches no DOM/style/events — trivially shadow-safe.

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to turn a cron expression into a readable description, instead of writing a parser by hand, because native implementations fail on L/W/#, seconds/year fields, and multilingual word order.
en.why_valuable: AI can reliably explain only common five-field cron expressions by default. With Quartz special characters, ambiguous field counts, and locales, it invents meanings; this library produces deterministic text.

schema.expression: string -- 5/6/7-field cron, Quartz cron, or a nickname such as @yearly
schema.locale?: string -- i18n locale id; default 'en'; use 'zh_CN' for Simplified Chinese
schema.use24HourTimeFormat?: boolean -- Determined by locale by default
